spec_match.rationale: Combines AbortSignal.timeout() with await using so timeout cancels the whole scope's resource stack — sophisticated combined use of the proposal.

interactive.rationale: Two side-by-side scenarios (fast vs slow) showing scope exit in each case.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Card promises within-deadline + over-deadline scenarios; delivered.

edge_cases.rationale: Doesn't show what happens when MULTIPLE timeouts compose (AbortSignal.any with multiple timeout signals).

references.rationale: See also links to chromestatus.com/feature/5071005145530368 — WRONG feature ID. This belongs to feature 5087324181102592.

openQuestions.title: Fix the wrong chromestatus link
openQuestions.detail: See also points at chromestatus.com/feature/5071005145530368 but this concept belongs to feature 5087324181102592.

openQuestions.title: Show composed timeout/abort signals
openQuestions.detail: Real apps combine a timeout with a user-cancel button via AbortSignal.any. Add a scenario that does this and watch the disposer fire when EITHER fires.

summary: Strong combined demo of timeout + await using. Ships the WRONG chromestatus feature ID and doesn't cover composed-signal cases.
